visual_description: A bald man in dark clothing grimaces in a dim blue setting. A silhouetted figure in a long coat stands on a rocky outcrop with arms outstretched toward a massive, luminous sphere crackling with blue lightning. The view shifts to a close-up of a hand gripping a dark, textured wand, then to a blurry shot of the wand being waved, producing bright light, and finally to a figure in dark attire standing on a high rocky ledge overlooking a dark horizon.
